title: Makassar Heat Wave
lead: Makassar is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.57. Temperatures are extremely high, causing severe conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Makassar has reached a critical level, with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The high temperatures are causing discomfort to the residents, with a relative humidity of 71% and wind speed of 3.2 km/h. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 11.5 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling systems.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately
